summary: Iteration 26 - Batch 4 testing complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All 20 UI scenarios verified via Playwright. All new admin-driven features (locations with CZ/WORLD, section settings, featured items) working correctly. SpecialistsPage and SupportPage fully dynamic. Footer consolidated. RichTextEditor working with HTML rendering. Section markers are circles. AppSettingsContext loads from API on start.

feature_test_results.GET_locations_with_country_field: PASS - /api/locations returns list with 'country' field (CZ or WORLD) on each item
feature_test_results.POST_admin_locations_cz: PASS - POST /api/admin/locations?country=CZ creates location with country=CZ
feature_test_results.POST_admin_locations_world: PASS - POST /api/admin/locations?country=WORLD creates location with country=WORLD
feature_test_results.POST_admin_locations_default_cz: PASS - POST without country param defaults to CZ
feature_test_results.PUT_admin_locations_country: PASS - PUT /api/admin/locations/{id} can update country field
feature_test_results.GET_settings_sections_6_keys: PASS - /api/settings/sections returns 6 keys: specialists, legal, news, community, support, nearby
feature_test_results.section_settings_title_subtitle_color: PASS - Each section has title/subtitle/color fields
feature_test_results.PUT_admin_settings_sections: PASS - PUT persists to DB; GET reflects updated values
feature_test_results.GET_featured_items_empty: PASS - /api/featured-items returns empty list when nothing pinned
feature_test_results.POST_admin_featured_items_specialist: PASS - Can pin specialist; appears in GET /api/featured-items
feature_test_results.DELETE_admin_featured_items: PASS - DELETE unpins item; no longer appears in GET
feature_test_results.POST_admin_featured_items_news: PASS - Can pin news article; appears in GET
feature_test_results.featured_items_max_3: PASS - Returns 400 when trying to pin 4th item of same type
feature_test_results.GET_admin_specialist_categories: PASS - Returns dynamic list of categories from DB with id/name
feature_test_results.GET_settings_marker_colors: PASS - Returns 7 valid hex color keys
feature_test_results.footer_3_links: PASS - Footer has exactly 3 nav links: O projektu, Zásady komunity, Kontakt
feature_test_results.footer_nahlasit_problem_pill: PASS - 'Nahlásit problém' button has rounded-full class (pill styling)
feature_test_results.specialists_categories_dynamic: PASS - SpecialistsPage shows 6 buttons loaded from /api/admin/specialist-categories (not hardcoded)
feature_test_results.specialists_region_filter_api: PASS - Region filter dropdown present (uses czLocations from useLocations hook)
feature_test_results.section_marker_circle: PASS - .section-marker computed styles: width=10px, height=10px, border-radius=50%
feature_test_results.support_dialog_cz_world_toggle: PASS - New offer dialog has CZ/WORLD toggle (data-testid=form-country-CZ/WORLD)
feature_test_results.support_location_filter_api: PASS - Location filter dropdown uses allLocations from useLocations hook
feature_test_results.admin_obsah_location_country_selector: PASS - Lokality card has country dropdown (Česká republika/Svět) with ČR badge on each location
feature_test_results.admin_obsah_section_settings: PASS - Section settings card with Edit button; shows 6 sections (specialists/legal/news/support/nearby/community) after clicking edit
feature_test_results.admin_obsah_featured_items_panel: PASS - Featured items card shows 7 specialists + 10 news with pin/unpin toggle buttons
feature_test_results.rich_text_editor_toolbar: PASS - RichTextEditor shows Bold(B)/Italic(I)/S/M/L buttons with data-testid attrs
feature_test_results.news_html_rendering: PASS - Bold text typed in editor generates <b> tags; article view renders HTML with dangerouslySetInnerHTML
feature_test_results.app_settings_context_loads: PASS - AppSettingsContext loads markerColors from /api/settings/marker-colors and sections from /api/settings/sections on app start
feature_test_results.homepage_dynamic_section_titles: PASS - HomePage uses sections.community.title, sections.news.title etc from AppSettingsContext
feature_test_results.homepage_featured_section_conditional: PASS - Featured section (data-testid=featured-section) only renders when featuredItems.length > 0
feature_test_results.unread_poll_15s: PASS - Layout.js setInterval(fetchUnread, 15000) confirmed in source code

critical_code_review_comments: Backend test had shallow copy bug (dict(current) vs deepcopy) causing section title test to not restore properly - FIXED in test file
AdminPage.js is now very long (1700+ lines) - recommend splitting into sub-components (ObsahTab, SectionSettingsPanel, FeaturedItemsPanel)
RichTextEditor uses deprecated execCommand('bold') API - may have future browser compatibility issues, but works in all current browsers
useLocations hook has correct fallback (FALLBACK_CZ/WORLD/ALL) for when API is unavailable - good defensive pattern
SupportPage allLocOpts includes 'all' for filter but formLocations filters by formCountry - correct separation
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_RichHTML_Iter26 news article during HTML rendering test. Created and deleted TEST_CZ_Location_Iter26, TEST_WORLD_Location_Iter26, TEST_Default_Location_Iter26, TEST_Update_Location_Iter26 locations during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified all 20 Batch 4 features: (1) Locations have CZ/WORLD country field - GET /api/locations returns country, POST/PUT respect country param; (2) /api/settings/sections returns 6 sections with title/subtitle/color - PUT updates, GET reflects; (3) Featured items CRUD: GET /api/featured-items, POST /api/admin/featured-items, DELETE /api/admin/featured-items/{type}/{id} - all working, max 3 per type enforced; (4) Admin Obsah tab: location CZ/WORLD selector, section settings panel (6 sections), featured items panel (all specialists+news listed with toggle buttons); (5) SpecialistsPage: dynamic categories from API, CZ/WORLD toggle, region filter from API; (6) SupportPage: new offer dialog CZ/WORLD toggle, location filter from API; (7) Footer: exactly 3 links + rounded-full pill button; (8) RichTextEditor: B/I/S/M/L toolbar, HTML in DB, article renders dangerouslySetInnerHTML; (9) Section markers: .section-marker CSS is 10x10px circle (border-radius: 50%); (10) AppSettingsContext: loads markerColors+sections from API on startup, applies CSS vars. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration26.py
